message:
docs(README): add pane actions section

Document the 'wa send' command for sending input to panes:
- Basic usage: wa send <pane_id> "<text>"
- Dry run mode: --dry-run to preview without executing
- Wait-for verification: --wait-for "ok" to confirm receipt
- Control flags: --no-paste, --no-newline

These commands are policy-gated and subject to risk scoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -230,6 +230,15 @@ wa show <pane_id>           # Detailed pane info
 wa get-text <pane_id>       # Recent output from pane
 ```
 
+### Pane Actions
+
+```bash
+wa send <pane_id> "<text>"                 # Send input (policy-gated)
+wa send <pane_id> "<text>" --dry-run       # Preview without executing
+wa send <pane_id> "<text>" --wait-for "ok" # Verify via wait-for
+wa send <pane_id> "<text>" --no-paste --no-newline
+```
+
